title: This Roborock Smart Vacuum Has a Robot Arm and Is 50% Off Right Now
summary: The Roborock Saros Z70 robot vacuum and mop is a reliable option for a mix of floor types, with a strong feature set and the added novelty of that robot arm (which can double as a futuristic party trick).
